source.title: Northstar store operations transformation final proposal
source.summary: Final proposal and decision feedback show that Northstar selected the phased rollout option because it reduced store-manager retraining risk and gave regional teams a controlled launch plan.

claims.text: Northstar selected the phased rollout option for its store operations transformation program.
Northstar valued the proposal because it reduced store-manager retraining risk and gave regional teams a controlled launch plan.
